findings.description: 30s and 1m UI ranges do not use true backend buckets; the frontend silently rewrites them to 5m history and synthesizes timestamps, so range switching shows fabricated timeline points instead of real bucketed data.

Tooltip still anchors to bucket end timestamp only; backend returns bucketStart/bucketEnd for exact boundaries, but the chart types and tooltip ignore them, so 'exact tooltip timestamps' in BOARD is not actually implemented.

Metrics E2E coverage was not updated for the new short ranges/panelized UI. Existing test only checks legacy 1h/6h/24h/7d buttons and uses weak assertions, so regressions in 30s/1m fallback behavior and panel separation are unguarded.
